productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Casual Brown Slipper
description: A reinterpretation of a classic style, this numero uno slipper is a fashion must-have. Style your look to perfection with these excellently designed slippers that ensure comfort and reflect an easy-going attitude. UpperSynthetic leather upper with thong straps for enhanced durability and comfortSynthetic woven lining below the thong straps for comfortFabric toe separator for gripSpecial stitch detailing along the medial to support the arch of the footMildly padded synthetic leather footbed OutsoleTextured durable rubber outsole for absolute grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, damp clothDo not store in direct sunlight
